title: Cooking Measurement Converter - Kitchen Unit Conversion
description: Free cooking measurement converter. Convert between cups, tablespoons, teaspoons, ml, liters, ounces, and grams for baking and cooking.
keywords: cooking measurement converter, kitchen unit conversion, cups to ml, tablespoons to teaspoons, baking converter
intro: Convert between common cooking measurements. Switch between cups, tablespoons, teaspoons, milliliters, and fluid ounces instantly.

faq.q: How many tablespoons in a cup?
faq.a: There are 16 tablespoons in 1 US cup (236.6 ml). A half cup equals 8 tablespoons.

faq.q: How many teaspoons in a tablespoon?
faq.a: There are 3 teaspoons in 1 tablespoon. This is a universal standard measurement.

faq.q: What is the difference between dry and liquid measurements?
faq.a: Dry cups measure volume by weight settling, while liquid cups measure fluid volume. For accuracy, use a kitchen scale for dry ingredients.
